items.title: Top Players Driving the European Smart Home Market Growth to 2029: Key Trends and Insights
items.author: Globe Newswire
items.description: The European smart home market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.7% from 2024 to 2029, driven by government incentives for energy efficiency and increasing demand for solutions to support the elderly. Key players in the market include Johnson Controls, Schneider Electric, and Honeywell.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Johnson Controls as a global leader in smart home products and solutions that enhance security, comfort, convenience, and energy efficiency for homeowners.
Honeywell is mentioned as offering a wide portfolio of products, software, solutions, and technologies that complement the connectivity and security of smart home products for homeowners.
